title: Mouse Ovariectomy
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4g22b","text":"This protocol outlines the steps to perform an Ovariectomy in a mouse","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Anesthetize the mouse with Ketamine ( 100 µL / 100 g )
Shave and disinfect the area below the ribs
Place the mouse on the side
Align 2 tweezers with the arms/legs and use the crossing point as a reference for the incision
Perform a small incision and pull out the fat/ovary
Clamp right below and above the ovary
Suture both the inner and out layers
Disinfect the suture with antibiotic ointment
creator: Jacquelyn Haytayan
